name: html-boilerplate
description: A minimal starter template for static HTML projects

scripts.serve:development: concurrently "npm run html:watch" "npm run js:watch" "npm run css:watch" "npm run css:lint:watch" "npm run serve"
scripts.serve:production: npm run compile:production && npm run serve
scripts.compile:development: npm run html:compile && npm run js:compile && npm run css:compile && npm run css:lint
scripts.compile:production: npm run html:production && npm run js:production && npm run css:production && node scripts/inline-styles && node scripts/inline-scripts && node scripts/cleanup-public --ext=js,css
scripts.html:watch: npm run html:compile && chokidar "src/index.html" --command "npm run html:compile"
scripts.css:lint:watch: npm run css:lint && chokidar "public/*.css" --command "npm run css:lint"
